title: Police launch manhunt for suspects after three men shot dead at Gordon’s Bay Mall
description: NATIONAL NEWS - Police have launched a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - Police have launched a manhunt for suspects after three men were shot dead in the Western Cape.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - Police have launched a manhunt for suspects after three men were shot dead in the Western Cape."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"It is understood that the shooting occurred at the Gordon’s Bay Mall on Tuesday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Police spokesperson Brigadier Novela Potelwa said the three men, aged between 40 and 45, were shot and killed in Gordon’s Bay on Tuesday evening.","html":"Police spokesperson Brigadier Novela Potelwa said the three men, aged between 40 and 45, were shot and killed in Gordon’s Bay on Tuesday evening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Western Cape police have launched a manhunt for gunmen.”","html":"“Western Cape police have launched a manhunt for gunmen.”"},{"type":"heading","text":"Shooting","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Potelwa said official reports indicate that the deceased men were in the parking lot at Gordon’s Bay Mall when the shooting occurred.","html":"Potelwa said official reports indicate that the deceased men were in the parking lot at Gordon’s Bay Mall when the shooting occurred."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“At approximately 21:30, when unknown gunmen travelling in a vehicle approached them, and shots were fired. Two victims died inside the vehicle, and another outside the car. The suspects later fled in their vehicle.","html":"“At approximately 21:30, when unknown gunmen travelling in a vehicle approached them, and shots were fired. Two victims died inside the vehicle, and another outside the car. The suspects later fled in their vehicle."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Gordon’s Bay police have registered a triple murder docket for investigation. The incident is believed to be gang-related,” Potelwa said.","html":"“Gordon’s Bay police have registered a triple murder docket for investigation. The incident is believed to be gang-related,” Potelwa said."},{"type":"heading","text":"Information","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Potelwa said no one has been arrested yet.","html":"Potelwa said no one has been arrested yet."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Anyone with information that could assist the police investigation is urged to contact the police on 08600 10111."},{"type":"heading","text":"Gangsterism","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meanwhile, the involvement of civil society groups in the fight against gangsterism in the Western Cape – and the declaration of the province as a disaster area – will help combat the scourge, according to experts.","html":"Meanwhile, the involvement of civil society groups in the fight against gangsterism in the Western Cape – and the declaration of the province as a disaster area – will help combat the scourge, according to experts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Recently, the Cape Crime Crisis Coalition (C4) announced that it was negotiating with the authorities to declare the crisis a provincial disaster and also to officially include civil society groups in a fight against the crisis, which has claimed the lives of many young people in the Western Cape.","html":"Recently, the Cape Crime Crisis Coalition (C4) announced that it was negotiating with the authorities to declare the crisis a provincial disaster and also to officially include civil society groups in a fight against the crisis, which has claimed the lives of many young people in the Western Cape."},{"type":"heading","text":"‘Human-made catastrophe","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In an interview with The Citizen yesterday, C4 chair reverend Llewellyn MacMaster, said wile the Western Cape provincial government, under premier Alan Winde, is rightly and urgently advocating for a provincial state of disaster in response to recent wildfires and the impending drought, it continues to maintain a disturbing and morally indefensible silence on a far more deadly, persistent, and entirely human-made catastrophe.","html":"In an interview with The Citizen yesterday, C4 chair reverend Llewellyn MacMaster, said wile the Western Cape provincial government, under premier Alan Winde, is rightly and urgently advocating for a provincial state of disaster in response to recent wildfires and the impending drought, it continues to maintain a disturbing and morally indefensible silence on a far more deadly, persistent, and entirely human-made catastrophe."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“[This] is the ongoing gang violence crisis devastating communities on the Cape Flats. This stark contrast in urgency and political will raises a deeply troubling question,” said MacMaster."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We are appealing to the government to meet with us and design a new plan together as civil societies, because previous plans did not work. They initially sent the army, but that never helped.”","html":"“We are appealing to the government to meet with us and design a new plan together as civil societies, because previous plans did not work. They initially sent the army, but that never helped.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Additional reporting by Masoka Dube","html":"Additional reporting by Masoka Dube"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen","html":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Police launch manhunt for suspects after three men shot dead at Gordon’s Bay Mall
